data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a completion certificate contingent on 80% attendance, but the evidence does not provide any API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. While it is stated that Sarah attended 11 out of 12 sessions, there is no explicit evidence showing how the system calculates attendance or issues the certificate based on this criterion. This lack of direct evidence leads to a conclusion that there is a gap in satisfying the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of API reads or persisted state checks confirming the issuance of a completion certificate based on attendance.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
